Types

FileSizeUnit = enum
  Bytes = "B", Kilobytes = "KB", Megabytes = "MB", Gigabytes = "GB",
  Terabytes = "TB"
FSize = ref object
  size*: float64
  unit*: FileSizeUnit
  bytes*: int64
  op*: SizeOp
SizeOp = enum
  soNone, EQ, NE, LT, LTE, GT, GTE

Procs

proc `!=`(fs: FSize): FSize {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
